articles.headline: Humanoid robots will change work forever
articles.description: There is now a global race to build humanoids that can walk, talk, reason, lift, carry, fetch, stack and generally operate in a human environment.

articles.headline: Figure AI sued by whistleblower who warned that startup's robots could 'fracture a human skull'
articles.description: A former engineer for Figure AI filed a lawsuit against the company, claiming he was unlawfully terminated after warning executives about product safety.

articles.headline: Humanoid robots get ‘real-world intelligence’, full autonomy with US firm’s BrainPack
articles.description: OpenMind's modular unit allows robots to perform advanced functions like self-guided patrols and real-time 3D mapping.

articles.headline: Kraken Robotics Reports Record Q3 2025 Financial Results
articles.description: 60% Revenue Growth, 59% Gross Margin, and 25% EBITDA MarginST. JOHN'S, Newfoundland and Labrador, Nov. 24, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Kraken Robotics Inc. (TSX-V: PNG, OTCQB: KRKNF) ("Kraken" or the "Company"), announced it has filed its financial results for the quarter ended September 30, 2025 (“Q3 2025”). Please refer to the unaudited Condensed Consolidated Interim Financial Statements and Management’s Discussion and Analysis (“MD&A”) for quarter ended September 30, 2025, filed on www.sedarplus

articles.headline: Xiaomi open-sources AI model spanning autonomous driving and robotics
articles.description: EV and AI initiatives have become an increasingly important part of Xiaomi’s business.

articles.headline: This startup bucked mainstream robotics training methods to teach a robot how to load the dishes
articles.description: Sunday Robotics spent less than 2 years in stealth figuring out how to train robots to complete complex tasks like handling dishes using human data.

articles.headline: Armstrong Robotics wants to create general purpose kitchen robots, starting with dishwashing
articles.description: Armstrong Robotics has already deployed autonomous dishwashing robots at restaurants for a year and a half.

articles.headline: Whistleblower lawsuit claims Figure AI robots have the strength to fracture skulls
articles.description: Former safety chief claims Figure AI's humanoid robots can fracture skulls and alleges he was fired for raising concerns. The robotics startup, now valued at $39 billion with backing from Nvidia and Jeff Bezos, denies wrongdoing and cites poor performance as the reason for termination.

articles.headline: DEEP Robotics Robot Dog "Stations" at Yiwu International Trade City, Ushering in a New Chapter of Smart Security Empowered by Technology
articles.description: Yiwu, Zhejiang, China--(Newsfile Corp. - November 24, 2025) - At the Zhejiang Yiwu International Trade City, aptly known as the "World's Supermarket," a special new employee has recently started its duty: a robot dog from DEEP Robotics. It has officially begun its role, undertaking three core responsibilities: patrolling key areas at night, identifying potential fire hazards, and providing early warning for abnormal activities. As the market's first "24/7 non-stop" technological security guard,.

articles.headline: Elon Musk says that in 10 to 20 years, work will be optional and money will be irrelevant thanks to AI and robotics
articles.description: “It’ll be like playing sports or a video game or something like that,” the Tesla CEO said.
